title: task2ci config
description: Configuration file (.task2ci.yml) for the task2ci generator. Defines action versions and tags that tasks reference via `# @ci:` annotations.

actions.description: Global overrides for action references used in every job.

checkout.description: Action ref for the checkout step. Default: actions/checkout@v4

setup-task.description: Action ref that installs go-task on the runner. Used only when go-task is not declared as a Go tool dependency. Default: go-task/setup-task@v2

setup-task2ci.description: Action ref that installs task2ci on the runner. Used only when task2ci is not declared as a Go tool dependency. Default: arnested/setup-task2ci@v1

tags.description: Mapping from tag name (referenced in `# @ci: <tag>` annotations) to its workflow/job/runner.

additionalProperties.description: A tag definition. `runs-on` is required; `workflow` defaults to "taskfile" and `job` defaults to the tag name.

workflow.description: Workflow file the tagged tasks group into (without extension). One file per distinct workflow is generated under .github/workflows/. Default: taskfile

job.description: Job name within the workflow. Multiple tags can target the same job; their `runs-on` must agree. Default: the tag name.

runs-on.description: GitHub Actions runner label. Pin a specific version (e.g. ubuntu-24.04, macos-14) rather than a floating tag like ubuntu-latest to avoid surprise breakage on runner upgrades.
